title: AI Digital Employee? Claude Tagging & The AI Market Revealed! #shorts
summary: A video discussing how AI assistants like Claude are transforming Slack and Teams through tagging capabilities. The content explores the evolving AI market and introduces the concept of loop engineering for future workplace applications.
writeup: This short covers how AI assistants such as Claude are being integrated into Slack and Teams through tagging, letting them be pulled into conversations directly. It frames this as part of a shifting AI market and introduces loop engineering as a concept for future workplace use, positioning tagged assistants as something closer to a digital employee. The takeaways: tagging turns chat tools into entry points for AI, and loop engineering extends prompt engineering toward ongoing workplace applications.
